prompt: Create a cinematic wide 16:9 anime fantasy illustration of a joyful white-haired girl warrior riding one majestic feathered white griffin low over a sunlit alpine wildflower meadow. The composition has exactly two main subjects: 1 young female rider and 1 griffin mount. Show the griffin with an eagle-like head, sharp golden eye, white feathered body, long white tail, four legs, and exactly two enormous wings spread diagonally across the frame, with layered feathers catching warm sunlight. The rider has long flowing silver-white hair, a bright happy expression, light fantasy armor over a pale blue-and-white adventurer dress, small boots, gloves, and a short white cape or skirt fluttering behind her; she sits in a brown leather saddle with straps and small travel pouches, holding reins as if gliding just above the flowers. Set the scene in golden morning with a brilliant blue sky, soft cumulus clouds, distant rolling green-and-gold hills, hazy mountains, and a wide valley glowing in warm light. Fill the foreground with bright meadow grass and wildflowers, including white daisies, yellow blossoms, purple and blue flowers, with colorful windblown petals and loose white feathers swirling through the air to enhance speed and joy. Use a dynamic low-angle perspective from within the flowers, shallow depth of field on the nearest blossoms, strong rim lighting, luminous painterly detail, crisp anime character rendering, epic fantasy adventure mood, vibrant colors, no text, no watermark.
